metadata.description: Add and operate transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push notifications with SenderKit — welcome emails, password resets, OTP, magic links, receipts, and notification systems. Sends directly or routes through providers like Resend, SendGrid, Postmark, and Twilio (no vendor lock-in), in code or via MCP.

plugins.name: senderkit
